title: Any plans to make time tracking column writeable?
excerpt: So, our team has been trying to use the time tracking feature to log time spent on tasks. It’s been hard to use it, since you can only see time logged for one task a time, and the calendar/logged time view is generally k…

posts.author: falquaddoomi (Faisal Alquaddoomi)
posts.cookedHtml: So, our team has been trying to use the time tracking feature to log time spent on tasks. It’s been hard to use it, since you can only see time logged for one task a time, and the calendar/logged time view is generally kind of hard to use. I’ve been working on a time tracking overview app, which works fine for viewing work logged in the time tracking column, but I can’t write to the column. Are there any plans to make the column writeable?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @falquaddoomi !

This is a great topic that my team helps with on a regular basis. We would love to show you how to enhance your time tracking to get the most out of your monday.com account. You can schedule a 30-minute session with me to talk and walk through this together.

Hope to hear from you soon!
